items.title: CMS issues No Surprises Act IDR final rule
items.reason: Authoritative rulemaking directly implementing the IDR process.
items.summary: CMS finalized changes to the Independent Dispute Resolution process under the No Surprises Act. The rule adjusts fee structures and batching eligibility.

items.title: Fifth Circuit rules on No Surprises Act IDR process
items.reason: Federal appellate decision interpreting the dispute-resolution scheme.
items.summary: The appeals court addressed how arbitrators must weigh the qualifying payment amount. The decision remands portions of the prior guidance.

items.title: Major insurer overhauls prior authorization requirements
items.reason: Significant payer policy shift affecting utilization management.
items.summary: A national payer announced it will drop prior-authorization requirements for several hundred procedure codes. The change takes effect next quarter.
